sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Bean Falling/Placement
special_mechanics.description: Colored bean pairs fall from top of screen, can be moved and rotated until reaching bottom. Four matching beans of same color disappear, causing beans above to drop.

special_mechanics.name: Chain Combos
special_mechanics.description: Matches can trigger additional matches causing chain combos. Successful chains send grey 'refugee beans' to opponent's grid.

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. This is a falling-block puzzle game (Puyo Puyo variant), not a platformer. No character movement, gravity, jump, or sub-pixel physics apply. Game mechanics are turn-based block manipulation rather than real-time physics-based movement.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine (gameplay description)
